dialog.stepLabel: Santong: "I can't leave you here alone. It's too dangerous. Please com..."

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: I can't leave you here alone. It's too dangerous. Please come back with me!

items.speaker: Gongming
items.text: All my comrades are here. I'm not going anywhere!

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Nice to meet you. I'm Santong, and this is my grandpa.

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: I asked my grandpa where he went every day, and he mentioned meeting up with his old friends.

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Only now do I realize he's been coming here daily! I just wanted to convince him to return to Jinzhou, but he wouldn't listen. So frustrating!

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: I hope he hasn't caused you any trouble. I apologize on behalf of my grandpa.

options.text: It's a bit of trouble, but it's fine.

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Thank you so much. I'm trying to persuade him to go home and get proper treatment, hoping it will help him recover sooner.

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Oh no, I'm really sorry! I'm trying to persuade him to go home and get proper treatment, hoping it will help him recover sooner.

items.speaker: Gongming
items.text: Hey, young {Male=man;Female=lady}! Shiying must be happy to see someone visit him!

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Grandpa, now that the flowers are delivered, how about we head back home?

items.speaker: Gongming
items.text: No, I have to stay with them. I promised them, so I have to keep my word.

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Stop being stubborn, grandpa! You’re trying to enter a military facility! You're no longer in service and you’re obstructing the military officers!

items.speaker: Gongming
items.text: I did NOT obstruct anyone! I didn't even try breaking into it! I was just standing here! You kids... Can't you kids just let this old man have his peace?

items.speaker: Gongming
items.text: I won't cause any trouble. I just want to spend a little more time with them.

items.speaker: Gongming
items.text: We promised we'd always be friends and stick together, but they weren't as fortunate as me. Let me stay here and have a chat with them. Is that too much to ask?

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: Alright, as long as you're happy...

items.speaker: Santong
items.text: But, if you can't find your way home or cause any trouble for the soldiers or Patrollers, no matter what you say, I'll take you home, okay?
